ActivateSubscription.description: Grants permission to activate a subscription to enable billing for a user

CancelAppointment.description: Grants permission to cancel an appointment

CreateAgent.description: Grants permission to create a new agent with an initial version in DRAFT state

CreateDomain.description: Grants permission to create a new domain for managing HealthAgent resources

CreateIntegration.description: Grants permission to create a new integration for a domain

CreateSession.description: Grants permission to create a new session with specified agent configurations

CreateSubscription.description: Grants permission to create a new subscription within a domain for billing and user management

DeactivateSubscription.description: Grants permission to deactivate a subscription to stop billing for a user

DeleteAgent.description: Grants permission to delete an agent configuration and all its versions

DeleteDomain.description: Grants permission to delete a domain and all associated resources

DeleteIntegration.description: Grants permission to delete an integration

GetAgent.description: Grants permission to retrieve an agent configuration, defaulting to the most recent version if not specified

GetCareTeamProvider.description: Grants permission to retrieve the care team provider of a patient

GetDomain.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a domain

GetIntegration.description: Grants permission to get an existing integration

GetMedicalScribeListeningSession.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about an existing Medical Scribe listening session

GetPatient.description: Grants permission to retrieve patient information

GetPatientInsightsJob.description: Grants permission to get details of a started patient insights job

GetPractitioner.description: Grants permission to retrieve practitioner information

GetSessionContext.description: Grants permission to retrieve structured session context including attributes and collected data

GetSubscription.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a subscription

InvokeAgent.description: Grants permission to invoke an agent within a session with streaming response support

ListAgents.description: Grants permission to list all agents in a domain

ListAppointmentSlots.description: Grants permission to list available appointment slots

ListDomains.description: Grants permission to list domains for a given account

ListIntegrations.description: Grants permission to list integrations for a domain

ListPatientAppointments.description: Grants permission to list patient appointments

ListPatientInsuranceCoverages.description: Grants permission to list patient insurance coverages

ListProviders.description: Grants permission to retrieve active providers available for scheduling appointments with a patient

ListSubscriptions.description: Grants permission to list all subscriptions within a domain

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags for the specified resource

MatchPatient.description: Grants permission to match a patient

PublishAgent.description: Grants permission to publish an agent configuration version

RescheduleAppointment.description: Grants permission to reschedule an appointment

ScheduleAppointment.description: Grants permission to schedule an appointment for a patient

StartMedicalScribeListeningSession.description: Grants permission to start a new Medical Scribe listening session for real-time audio transcription

StartPatientInsightsJob.description: Grants permission to start a new patient insights job

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add the specified tags to the specified resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove the tags identified by the TagKeys list from a resource

UpdateAgent.description: Grants permission to update a draft agent configuration, creating a new draft version if none exists

UpdateIntegration.description: Grants permission to update an existing integration

UpdateSession.description: Grants permission to update session attributes such as departmentId and appointmentType

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
